mechanism: Large carry trade positioning ($500B-$1T) can convert gradual correlation shifts into abrupt regime flips through forced deleveraging cascades hitting both equity and bond markets simultaneously, as demonstrated in July 2024 (VIX to 38, correlation to +0.5).
regime_dependence: Activated by BOJ tightening or yen appreciation shocks. Effect is episodic (days to weeks) rather than continuous. July 2024 provides the calibration event.
